title: Timbu
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Timbu''' were domesticated creatures that were found on backwater worlds such as [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] and [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]]. They were quadrupeds the size of a small [[Dewback/Legends|dewback]] with long snouts, black eyes, big floppy ears and were nearly as shaggy as a [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]]. They were prone to spit when startled or had their reins jerked too hard, their spittle was mentioned as ten times worse than a [[Tauntaun/Legends|tauntaun's]] worst spit wad.

{{Species-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
